parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const input = $('Validate Request').item.json.tool_input; if (input.lead_id) return 'https://zqwatouqmqgkmaslydbr.supabase.co/rest/v1/leads?id=eq.' + input.lead_id + '&select=*&limit=1'; if (input.email) return 'https://zqwatouqmqgkmaslydbr.supabase.co/rest/v1/leads?email=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(input.email) + '&select=*&limit=1'; return 'https://zqwatouqmqgkmaslydbr.supabase.co/rest/v1/leads?select=*&limit=1'; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_status: $('Validate Request').item.json.tool_input.lead_status, notes: $('Validate Request').item.json.tool_input.notes || '', updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const input = $('Validate Request').item.json.tool_input; let url = 'https://zqwatouqmqgkmaslydbr.supabase.co/rest/v1/leads?select=id,full_name,email,company,industry,lead_status,lead_score,city'; if (input.lead_status) url += '&lead_status=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(input.lead_status); if (input.industry) url += '&industry=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(input.industry); url += '&limit=' + (input.limit || 20); return url; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ tool_name: $('Format Response').item.json.tool, tool_input: $('Validate Request').item.json.tool_input, tool_output: $('Format Response').item.json.data, success: $('Format Response').item.json.success, execution_time_ms: $('Format Response').item.json.execution_time_ms }) }}
